steps.title: Keep one main verb
steps.content: The sentence's main verb is assembles. The blank must therefore add information about Richard Serra as a modifier, not create a second independent clause before the main verb arrives.

steps.title: Reject finite-verb errors
steps.content: A and D add finite verbs, creating a run-on structure with assembles. B separates Serra from intends with a comma and still creates a faulty finite-verb structure. A participial phrase set off by commas correctly modifies Serra. The answer is C.
